ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., MLB, NFL, NBA) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the game is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., MLB, NFL, NBA) */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitchers" (
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitcher */,
  "pitcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the pitcher */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the pitcher belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Primary position of the pitcher (e.g., starter, reliever) */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the pitcher started their professional career */,
  "career_highest_era" REAL /* Pitcher's highest career ERA */,
  "career_lowest_era" REAL /* Pitcher's lowest career ERA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitching_performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitching performance */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the performance belongs to */,
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitcher */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the pitcher belongs to */,
  "inning_pitched" REAL /* Number of innings pitched */,
  "hits_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of hits allowed */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of runs allowed */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks issued */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "pitches_thrown" INTEGER /* Total number of pitches thrown */,
  "game_score" INTEGER /* Pitcher's game score */,
  "era" REAL /* Pitcher's ERA for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_performances_pitcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitcher_id") REFERENCES pitchers ("pitcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_performances_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_performances_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_odds" (
  "odds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting odds record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the odds belong to */,
  "home_line" REAL /* Home team betting line */,
  "away_line" REAL /* Away team betting line */,
  "bookmaker" TEXT /* Bookmaker providing the odds */,
  "over_under" REAL /* Over/under line */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total points line */,
  "money_line" TEXT /* Money line for the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the odds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_odds_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, subscriber) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* User's subscription plan (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the game */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the game */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_access_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the analytics belong to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analytics */,
  "analytics_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics tool used (e.g., predictive modeling, data visualization) */,
  "analytics_results" TEXT /* Results of the analytics */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the analytics session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the analytics session */,
  "tool_version" TEXT /* Version of the analytics tool used */,
  "parameters_used" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analytics tool */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the analytics results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_analytics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
